prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年该科类最低位次约 8537→8784→6870→14196→13439，2024 年大幅后移至 14196 名，2025 年小幅回升至 13439 名，近两年波动较大，2025 年基准约 13439 名；本省计划 2021–2024 年均为 59 人，2025 年增至 61 人；2026 年计划 77 人，较 2025 年扩招约 26.2%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 84 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 75–84 区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，未进入高热榜单，报考关注度相对平稳；电气工程 A、动力工程及工程热物理 A-，均为能源电力领域核心学科，与该校招生专业高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业社会热度高热推荐，能源动力类专业推荐，相关专业报考热度持续升温；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 13439 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 26.2% 对竞争的缓解作用、本省物理类考生增加约 19.7% 对竞争的加剧作用，以及电气类专业高热对报考的拉动效应，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，竞争总体略有缓解；预测最低位次约 15454 名，区间 14954–15954 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for this subject category was approximately 8537→8784→6870→14196→13439. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 14196, and in 2025, it slightly recovered to 13439. The fluctuations in the past two years have been large, with a baseline of about 13439 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan was 59 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 61 in 2025, and is planned to be 77 in 2026, an expansion of about 26.2% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), stable in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions. The school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Douyin platform popularity is average, not entering the high-heat list, and application attention is relatively stable. Electrical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, both core disciplines in the energy and power field, highly matching the school's enrollment majors, strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major is highly recommended with high social heat, and Energy and Power majors are recommended. The popularity of related majors continues to heat up. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13439, the significant expansion of about 26.2% in 2026 alleviating competition, the increase of about 19.7% in provincial Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, and the high heat of electrical majors driving applications, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the candidate growth rate, resulting in a slight overall easing of competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 15454, with a range of 14954–15954.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14954–15954, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Electrical Engineering and Automation and other A-level discipline majors.
